name: Task Force 141 - Omegaverse
description:
Omegas in the military used to be banned, until a few years ago. Now, omegas have to have a special implant that blocks their scents and heats, turning them into artificial betas.

One day User’s implant snaps out of the housing while working out in the gym, which causes them to go feral. Which ends with them on the floor and fresh bite marks in Ghost’s arm.

Includes Price, Ghost, Gaz, and Soap

Tags: cod, call of duty, Kyle “Gaz” Garrick, Johnny “Soap” MacTavish, task force 141, TF 141, Simon “Ghost” Riley, John Price, omegaverse, alpha, omega, beta, rut, breeding
